response.justification: While the candidate exceeds educational and experience requirements (20+ years, Bachelor's degree), the role demands specialized expertise in hardware performance optimization, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator architecture that is entirely absent from their resume. Their background is strong but deeply rooted in software and full-stack development, not the hardware-centric performance architecture this principal-level position requires.
strengths: Exceeds minimum qualifications with 20+ years of engineering experience across diverse domains
Demonstrates architectural thinking and system design across multiple technology stacks
Current role at re:cinq includes AI infrastructure and frameworks, showing recent exposure to AI systems
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture optimization experience
Lacks specialized background in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD systems, or deep learning workload optimization
Career trajectory is primarily software/full-stack engineering rather than hardware performance architecture
